notes.content: Target board/chip context: demo suite uses GD32C231C_EVAL with Keil device GD32C231C8/GD32C231C8T6. Core Cortex-M23, max 48MHz, LQFP48, 64KB Flash (IROM 0x08000000 size 0x10000), 12KB SRAM (IRAM 0x20000000 size 0x3000), 45 GPIO. Key peripherals per official selector: 4x 16-bit GPTM, 1x advanced 16-bit timer, SysTick, 2 watchdogs, RTC, 3 USART/UART, 2 I2C, 2 SPI, 1 I2S, 1 ADC with 13 channels, 2 comparators. EVAL BSP maps LED1 PA15, LED2 PD1, LED3 PD3, LED4 PB4, WAKEUP PA0, USER PA4, USART0 PA9/PA10 115200.
